creator: gavin.atkinson@ury.york.ac.uk
text:
The IDE controller is not recognised by 6.2-RELEASE either.  It's
recognised under -HEAD as a Marvell 88SX6101 chipset, and will probably
be fixed by an MFC of the following commit:
http://docs.FreeBSD.org/cgi/mid.cgi?200701041609.l04G9B6F055151

This part of the PR at least is not i386 specific, as the controller also
doesn't work under amd64.

I can't comment on the xorg issues.
